# clerk_organization (Resource)

Manages a Clerk organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "clerk_organization" "example" {
  name                    = "My Organization"
  slug                    = "my-org"
  max_allowed_memberships = 100
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the organization.

### Optional

- `admin_delete_enabled` (Boolean) Whether administrators can delete the organization.
- `created_by` (String) ID of the user who creates the organization. The user becomes an admin member. Only settable at creation time.
- `max_allowed_memberships` (Number) Maximum number of memberships allowed for the organization.
- `private_metadata` (String, Sensitive) Private metadata as a JSON string. Only accessible from the backend.
- `public_metadata` (String) Public metadata as a JSON string. Accessible from both the frontend and backend.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly identifier for the organization. Auto-generated from name if not provided. Requires "Enable organization slugs" to be turned on in the Clerk Dashboard under Configure > Organization settings.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the organization was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the organization.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the organization was last updated.
